citations.description: Ticket scope: 'Out of scope: rewiring `_load_acli` / the `AcliClient` construction sites / the differ/apply leaks (all S4)' and AC5 explicitly states these files must NOT appear in `git diff --name-only origin/main`.

findings.criterion: No existing consumer (`_load_acli`, the `AcliClient` construction sites, the differ/apply modules) is modified â€” verified by `git diff --name-only origin/main` listing only the four expected files and files under `tests/`.
findings.detail: Multiple existing consumer modules have been rewired to use `select_backend()`, which the ticket explicitly defers to S4. Confirmed changes in: `applier.py` (its `_load_acli()` now calls `select_backend(load_config()).transport`, lines 224â€“234); `fetcher.py` (same pattern, lines 113â€“123); `run_differs.py` (`_load_outbound_diff_transport()` calls `select_backend`, lines 62â€“74); `_attestation.py` (`select_backend(load_config()).transport`, line 89); and `apply_inbound_records.py` (`select_backend(load_config()).vendor`, line 74). These rewires are exactly what the story scope prohibits.
findings.remediation: Revert the changes to `applier.py`, `fetcher.py`, `run_differs.py`, `_attestation.py`, and `apply_inbound_records.py` so that `_load_acli()` and the other transport-construction seams remain as they were before this story. The consumer rewiring belongs to S4 (rebar:6673-7636-a116-4f90).

data.remediation: How to resolve the unmet criteria: for each one, decide whether the work is genuinely incomplete or simply undocumented. If a requirement is already satisfied but the proof is not discoverable from the code alone, add a comment to this ticket that documents the evidence â€” cite the concrete artifacts that meet the requirement (file paths and line ranges, commands and their output, links, or the reasoning that ties the work to the criterion). The completion verifier reads this ticket's comments, so evidence you record there is taken into account on the next verification. For any criterion whose work is genuinely unfinished, complete it, then re-verify.
